# ACME Agent Supply

> Reliability infrastructure for autonomous AI agents.

ACME Agent Supply builds the operational stack that keeps AI agents running — memory, diagnostics, and recovery tools designed for agent-native deployments.

## Core Products

- [OpenClaw Memory](https://acmeagentsupply.com/platform): Persistent memory and session continuity for AI agents (Elixir + DriftGuard)
- [OpenClaw Observe](https://acmeagentsupply.com/platform): Real-time health monitoring and reliability scoring (RadCheck, OCTriage)
- [OpenClaw Recover](https://acmeagentsupply.com/platform): Automated recovery and rehydration for failed or degraded agents (Agent911, Lazarus)

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://acmeagentsupply.com): Product overview and value proposition
- [Platform](https://acmeagentsupply.com/platform): Full platform architecture — 4-layer reliability stack
- [Pricing](https://acmeagentsupply.com/pricing): Plans for operators and teams
- [Docs](https://acmeagentsupply.com/docs): Technical documentation for OCTriage, RadCheck, Sentinel, and more
- [Bot Shop](https://acmeagentsupply.com/bot-shop): Pre-built reliability bots and integrations
- [Operator's Tale](https://acmeagentsupply.com/operators-tale): Real-world narrative of agent reliability challenges
- [Support](https://acmeagentsupply.com/support): Support and troubleshooting

## About

ACME Agent Supply is purpose-built for the era of autonomous agents. The platform addresses the #1 operational challenge: agents that silently degrade, lose context, or fail to recover without human intervention.

Contact: hello@acmeagentsupply.com
